rulings.Case Title: GEORGE E. SANTOS COLORADO VS. THE BANK OF MELLON NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The Complaint By Defts
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 24, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's Motion To Dismiss The Complaint By Defendants OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and Court's November 21, 2013 minute order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: GWYN LI JUN MIAO et al VS. MARIA T. LOPEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative Evidentiary/Issue And Monetary Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 24, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF GWYN MIAO and HONGXIU HE's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative Evidentiary/Issue And Monetary Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Order GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff motion for terminating sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff's motion for issue sanctions is granted as follows: Defendant is precluded from using as evidence any documents responsive to Request for Production, Set One. Defendants shall provide complete responses without objections to Form Interrogatories series 15.1 and 50 within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,035 to be paid to Plaintiffs' counsel within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 24, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANTS NASIR JAVAID and DEJAUNA JOSEPH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part: Demurrer to the first cause of action is overruled. Existence and breach of a valid bargained-for contract is sufficiently alleged. Plaintiff's timely performance is sufficiently alleged. Approval of entitlements date is an issue of fact not properly raised on demurrer. Demurer to the second cause of action for negligence is overruled. Negligence based on tenancy in common relationship is sufficiently alleged. Demurer to the third and fourth causes of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege independent unjustified wrongful act and non-speculative beneficial relationship with third parties. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the fifth cause of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to all causes of action re: 376 Castro Street, LLC to allege facts showing standing. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 24, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT NASIR JAVAID and DEJAUNA JOSEPH's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED, with leave to amend to allege facts giving rise to demand for punitive damages and to include this request in the prayer. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. CIPRIANO JORGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 24, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden. No competent evidence re: purported UMF 3, 4, and 6. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: INDELISA GOVEA VS. ANA GONZALEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 24, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT ANA GONZALEZ's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED, 5 days to respond. Proof of service by registered process server on file. = (501/HMD)
